comments.text:
Is Warren Buffett’s $100B+ fortune just about the math? Or is it written in the stars? 

At AstroNeko, we analyzed the "Cosmic Blueprint" of the world’s greatest investor. Here’s why his stars were coded for the market:

The Analytical Engine (Virgo Sun): 
He doesn’t gamble. His Virgo energy demands data, precision, and disciplined research.

The Big Picture Vision (Sagittarius Moon/Rising): 
He sees global trends years before others do. It’s the "fire" that gives him the courage to take big, calculated risks. 

The Long-Term Master (Saturn in Capricorn): 
His secret weapon is patience. He ignores "get rich quick" trends to build steady, generational wealth. 

The Takeaway: 
Success happens when your natural talents meet disciplined action. Whether you’re trading crypto or building a business, your "inner blueprint" tells you exactly when to pounce. 

The stars provide the map, but you’re the one who hunts.

Want to see your own success blueprint? Drop a "Meow" below or DM us to see what AstroNeko AI finds in your chart! 

#WarrenBuffett #Astrology #Web3 #AstroNeko #Investing #AI #SuccessMindset

The Genesis Block of Love: 1st Crypto Wedding in Asia | A New Era of Web3 by EarthDeFIRE & Prai

From a viral sensation with over 5 million views to a groundbreaking reality! The Asian blockchain space is about to witness history as top Thai crypto influencer Earth (EarthDeFIRE) and his fiancée Prai host the ultimate futuristic nuptials:

"1st Crypto Wedding in Asia." Blending romance with Web3 technology, this mega-event is officially the first crypto wedding in Thailand and is poised to become the most famous crypto wedding in Asian history.

 The Genesis Block of Love goes beyond a unique concept—it is a historic gathering of the industry’s most valuable personnel and top-tier projects across Web3, Media, and Finance.

The event is spearheaded by #BitgetWallet as the Diamond Sponsor, joined by Silver Sponsors BitArcade, Beef Ex, and Richer Better. They are supported leading Event Partners such as 9 CAT Group, DTC Group, EfraStructure, and AstroNeko, and Media Partners like Siam Blockchain and Thunhoon, alongside an unprecedented alliance of over 40 top Community & KOL Partners acting as both witnesses and collaborators.

 &  This crypto wedding will be held on April 26, 2026, near BTS Bangna, Bangkok, Thailand.

 Exclusive Giveaway – Your Only Chance to Attend!
This historic event is strictly Exclusive Invite-Only. 

However, we have an insider secret for the crypto community: there is a highly anticipated giveaway with only 6 ultra-rare tickets available! If you want to rub shoulders with industry titans and be part of blockchain history, stay tuned for the rules and updates.

Follow Earth’s Facebook Page or X (Twitter) and track the hashtag #EarthDeFIRE now!
For event details, please visit: 
https://
luma.com/mqcb9iji

This is the Unofficial "Money20/20 Asia" Side Event! (April 21–23, 2026, at the Queen Sirikit National Convention Center (QSNCC))
